task_description: Sprint 8 Polish & Scale - Final sprint to make ChronAI launch-ready. Includes: Analytics dashboard, mobile responsiveness, page transitions, performance optimization, UI polish, accessibility, SEO, and bug sweep.

verification.summary: npm run build compiles successfully with all 12 routes (0 errors). npm run lint shows zero warnings or errors. Post-review fixes applied for useDebounce wiring, SVG gradient ID collision, reduced-motion support for intra-page animations, and analytics empty-period handling.
